content.content: Social media star who is famous for her alexandrahelena_ Instagram account. She rose to massive popularity as a young singer often singing directly to the camera. Her Instagram account was created in January 2017. She was four years old at the time. She has seen her Instagram account grow to boast more than 100,000 followers. She has appeared on Venezuelan TV, including Despierta America. Her parents have often been featured on her Instagram account. She has appeared alongsideKarla Martinezduring her appearance on Despierta America in April 2018.
